untranslatable_reason: This signal requires options-specific metrics (implied volatility, realized volatility, vega, gamma, spread selection logic, theta decay optimization) that are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also depends on multi-leg derivative strategies (negative vega spreads) which cannot be expressed through standard price-based technical indicators. The backtest engine appears to be designed for spot/futures trading, not options.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used india_vix (implied volatility proxy) > hvol_20 (realized volatility proxy) as a substitute for IV > RV condition, and restricted to HIGH_VOL regime. However, this is a poor approximation—the original signal requires precise IV/RV spread comparison, gamma/vega prioritization across multiple strikes, and options spread construction logic that cannot be captured by this JSON structure. Parameters iv_to_rv_threshold, gamma_priority_weight, vega_priority_weight, and strike_distance_from_atm cannot be operationalized without options data.
